parameters.content:
## New Hire IT Provisioning Automator
This workflow automatically provisions IT access the moment a new employee record is created in the HR system. It validates the incoming hire data, creates a Google Workspace account, generates an onboarding ticket, posts the new hire to a Slack channel, emails the manager a day-one checklist, and logs the whole run to a tracking sheet. This removes manual setup delays and makes sure every new hire is ready on day one.

### How it Works
	- Receives a new hire record from the HR system via webhook
	- Cleans and validates the incoming employee data
	- Stops the run if required fields like name or email are missing
	- Generates a company email address and starting credentials
	- Creates a Google Workspace user account for the new hire
	- Creates an IT onboarding ticket with an equipment and access checklist
	- Posts a welcome and provisioning summary to the IT Slack channel
	- Emails the hiring manager a day-one readiness checklist
	- Logs the completed provisioning run to a tracking spreadsheet

### Setup Steps
	1. Configure the HR system to send new hire records to the webhook URL
	2. Connect a Google Workspace admin credential for account creation
	3. Connect a ticketing tool credential for onboarding ticket creation
	4. Connect a Slack credential and set the IT notifications channel
	5. Connect a Gmail credential for manager checklist emails
	6. Connect a Google Sheets credential for run logging
	7. Activate the workflow so it runs automatically

## Step 1: Receive and Validate Hire

This section receives the new employee record from the HR system, cleans and standardizes the fields, and stops the run if required details such as name or work email are missing. It makes sure only complete and valid records move forward.

## Step 2: Provision Accounts and Access

This section generates the company email and starting credentials, creates the Google Workspace user account, and opens an IT onboarding ticket containing the full equipment and access checklist for the new hire.

## Step 3: Notify Team and Log Run

This section posts a provisioning summary to the IT Slack channel, emails the hiring manager a day-one readiness checklist, and records the completed run to a tracking spreadsheet for audit and reporting.
